candidates.title: Benchmarking spatial clustering methods with spatially resolved transcriptomics data
candidates.note: 13 methods on 34 SRT datasets across 7 sources. Rich comparison tables.

candidates.title: Assessing GPT-4 for cell type annotation in single-cell RNA-seq analysis
candidates.note: GPT-4 vs manual annotations. Clear concordance metrics.

candidates.title: Benchmarking clustering, alignment, and integration methods for spatial transcriptomics
Deep-learning-based gene perturbation effect prediction does not yet outperform simple linear baselines
candidates.note: Negative result: 5 foundation models vs simple baselines. Provocative.

candidates.title: Benchmarking DNA Foundation Models for Genomic and Genetic Tasks
candidates.note: 5 DNA models, 57 datasets, 4 task categories. FIRST TEST CASE - READY.

candidates.title: Community effort to optimize sequence-based deep learning models of gene regulation
candidates.note: DREAM Challenge. Prix Fixe framework. Millions of promoter sequences.

candidates.title: Long-read sequencing and genome assembly of natural history collection samples
Improved protein complex prediction with AlphaFold-multimer by denoising the MSA profile
candidates.note: MMscore 0.63->0.76 on CASP15. Clear quantitative gains.

candidates.title: SE(3)-equivariant ternary complex prediction towards target protein degradation (DeepTernary)
candidates.note: PROTAC/molecular glue ternary complex prediction. TernaryDB dataset.

candidates.title: ScopeDTI: Semi-inductive dataset construction for drug-target interaction prediction
candidates.note: DTI dataset + 3D structural modeling + bilinear attention.

candidates.title: Proteomic prediction of diverse incident diseases
candidates.note: ML on serum proteomics for 24 disease outcomes. AUC tables.

candidates.title: Multimodal precision neuroimaging of the individual human brain at ultra-high fields
candidates.note: 10 subjects, 7T MRI, multi-modal. Needs published version check.

candidates.title: Spatial and temporal pattern of structure-function coupling of human brain connectome with development
candidates.note: HCP data + Allen Brain Atlas. Structure-function coupling analysis.

candidates.title: Integrating single-cell RNA and TCR/BCR sequencing with mass cytometry reveals dynamic trajectories of human peripheral immune cells from birth to old age
candidates.note: 220 volunteers, 13 age groups. Multi-modal immune atlas.

candidates.title: Influence of B cell-lineage targeted CAR-T cell therapy on humoral immunity and vaccine response
candidates.note: 100-patient prospective study. Antibody titers for 12 pathogens.

candidates.title: Benchmarking bacterial taxonomic classification using nanopore metagenomics data of mock communities
candidates.note: Known mock communities as ground truth. Nanopore classification accuracy.

additional_test_cases_identified.title: Systematic Benchmarking of High-Throughput Subcellular Spatial Transcriptomics Platforms
additional_test_cases_identified.note: 5 platforms, 3 cancer types. From initial test paper search.

additional_test_cases_identified.title: Benchmarking reveals superiority of deep learning variant callers on bacterial nanopore sequence data
additional_test_cases_identified.note: 14 species, multiple variant callers. From initial test paper search.
